name: Best Broccoli Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can cream of mushroom soup, undiluted
1 can cream of celery soup, undiluted
1 package frozen chopped broccoli, thawed (10 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water and salt to a boil.
2. Add rice; cover and remove from heat. Let sit for 5 minutes.
3. Melt butter in a skillet; sauté onion and celery until tender.
4. In a large mixing bowl, combine the rice, celery, and onion with the remaining ingredients.
5. Pour the mixture into a greased 1 1/2 qt. casserole.
6. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
